techniques.name: plan-diff-apply-verify-report

techniques.one_line_intent: Reduce unsafe, opaque, or non-reviewable agent changes by requiring a visible workflow before and...
techniques.use_when_short: Use when agent-assisted code changes or infrastructure or configuration edits.
techniques.do_not_use_short: Avoid when trivial wording fixes with no meaningful operational consequence or urgent manual intervention where immediate human action matters more...
techniques.core_contract_short: Core contract: changes must stay reviewable by another human or agent; validation must be named explicitly, not implied.
techniques.main_risk_short: Main risk: VERIFY is named, the report looks complete, and review passes even though the validation was symbolic or never...
techniques.validation_short: Validate by checking a concrete plan exists before apply; the diff stays inside the declared scope; at least one explicit validation method...

techniques.name: source-of-truth-layout

techniques.one_line_intent: Reduce documentation drift by giving each recurring kind of project information one canonical document...
techniques.use_when_short: Use when multi-document repositories that mix planning, execution, history, and operations or solo+AI or human+agent projects where many edits happen...
techniques.do_not_use_short: Avoid when very small repositories where one short README is enough or projects that already use an external system as...
techniques.core_contract_short: Core contract: each recurring information class has one canonical home; each meaningful change routes to exactly one primary document first.
techniques.main_risk_short: Main risk: the role map drifts after repo evolution, so real updates no longer route to one canonical home.
techniques.validation_short: Validate by checking each major document has an explicit role; a sample change can be routed to one primary document without ambiguity...

techniques.name: contract-first-smoke-summary

techniques.core_contract_short: Core contract: each smoke path produces one machine-readable summary; the summary contains an explicit success or error status.
techniques.main_risk_short: Main risk: summaries collapse to a bare error signal without enough observed context to diagnose what failed.
techniques.validation_short: Validate by checking the summary file is always written on success and is written on failure whenever possible; the summary is valid...

techniques.core_contract_short: Core contract: the adapter does not perform real input events or equivalent side effects; the planning step emits a plan...

techniques.validation_short: Validate by checking the intent payload is accepted or rejected by explicit normalization rules; the normalized plan is written as an artifact...

techniques.name: new-intent-rollout-checklist

techniques.name: public-safe-artifact-sanitization
techniques.summary: Turn sensitive technical material into a shareable artifact by removing, redacting, or generalizing details while preserving the lesson and staying distinct from approval gating or execution planning.

techniques.core_contract_short: Core contract: the shared artifact does not leak secrets or private infrastructure detail; sanitization preserves meaning where possible.
techniques.main_risk_short: Main risk: over-sanitizing until the artifact stops being useful.
techniques.validation_short: Validate by checking obvious sensitive surfaces were checked deliberately; the resulting artifact is still understandable; the sanitization level matches the intended audience.

techniques.name: skill-vs-command-boundary
